# Third-party notices

This project (`gobrainpool`) is distributed under the Apache License 2.0
(see [LICENSE](LICENSE)). It incorporates or redistributes the
following third-party material. Each component is retained under its
original license; the project-level Apache-2.0 license does not
override these.

## fiat-crypto (generated field / scalar arithmetic)

**Files:** `internal/fiat/bp256/bp256.go`,
`internal/fiat/bp256n/bp256n.go`, `internal/fiat/bp384/bp384.go`,
`internal/fiat/bp384n/bp384n.go`, `internal/fiat/bp512/bp512.go`,
`internal/fiat/bp512n/bp512n.go`.

**Origin:** Autogenerated by
[fiat-crypto](https://github.com/mit-plv/fiat-crypto) (Andres Erbsen,
Jade Philipoom, Jason Gross et al., MIT CSAIL). The invocation
command is preserved at the top of each generated file.

**License:** The fiat-crypto generated output is triple-licensed under
your choice of **MIT**, **BSD-3-Clause**, or **Apache License 2.0**.
See the upstream
[COPYRIGHT](https://github.com/mit-plv/fiat-crypto/blob/master/COPYRIGHT)
for the full notices. This project chooses the Apache-2.0 path and
redistributes the generated files unmodified.

## Go standard library (rightShift in ecdsa.go)

**File:** `ecdsa.go` (single function `rightShift`).

**Origin:** Copied verbatim from
[`crypto/internal/fips140/ecdsa.rightShift`](https://cs.opensource.google/go/go)
in the Go standard library.

**License:** **BSD-3-Clause**. Copyright (c) 2009 The Go Authors. All
rights reserved. The full license text is distributed with the Go
toolchain and is available at
[https://go.dev/LICENSE](https://go.dev/LICENSE).

## Google Wycheproof test vectors

**Files:** `testdata/wycheproof/ecdsa_brainpoolP256r1_sha256.json.gz`,
`testdata/wycheproof/ecdsa_brainpoolP384r1_sha384.json.gz`,
`testdata/wycheproof/ecdsa_brainpoolP512r1_sha512.json.gz`.

**Origin:** [Project Wycheproof](https://github.com/google/wycheproof),
Google LLC.

**License:** **Apache-2.0**. See
[`testdata/wycheproof/LICENSE`](testdata/wycheproof/LICENSE) for the
upstream copy distributed with the vectors. Redistributed here as test
fixtures.

## Brainpool curve parameters

The numerical parameters of BP256r1, BP384r1, BP512r1 (primes, curve
coefficients, base points, group orders, cofactor) are published in
[RFC 5639](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc5639) (ECC
Brainpool, March 2010). RFCs are not themselves copyrightable, and
numerical standards values are facts rather than authored works. No
additional license applies to these constants.
